description: You are a robotics engineer debugging an Automated Optical Inspection (AOI) system for Printed Circuit Boards (PCBs). The project pcb_inspector, located at /home/ga/PycharmProjects/pcb_inspector, uses Computer Vision to compare manufactured boards against a golden reference. The system is currently failing: it crashes on certain image types, misidentifies defect locations, and reports inaccurate defect counts. Fix the bugs within the pcb_inspector package to ensure the system functions correctly and all tests in the tests/ directory pass. Do not modify the test files or the data generation script.
